name: question
label: Question
default: How do I request a new brand asset?
help_text: Phrase as a real ministry-center question. Plain English.

name: answer
label: Answer
default: Email vhassan@hcfm.org or eepau@hcfm.org with: ministry name, asset type, deadline, and any reference materials.
help_text: Rich text. Keep it plain and conversational. Link to relevant pages where helpful.

name: category
label: Category (optional)
help_text: e.g. Logos, Colors, Workflow. Leave blank for general.

name: is_pinned
label: Pin to top
help_text: Pinned questions render with a small 'Pinned' badge.
